prompt: Dark-themed AI operations command center. Inspired by Midday.ai (DarkModeDesign.com, March 2026) — agent-first "business stack for modern founders" with deep dark palette and always-on metrics. Also Traffic Productions (Godly.website, March 2026) — stats baked into bold typography ("GROW WITH TRAFFIC (27%)"). Design concept: treat AI agents like a military ops fleet — live status grid, mission kanban, anomaly triage, deploy wizard, analytics. Deep space dark (#050810) + electric cyan (#00CFFF) + violet (#8B5CF6). Key pattern: scrolling live metrics ticker inspired by financial trading terminals. 6 screens: Command, Agents, Missions, Alerts, Deploy, Analytics.
